description: The 'Ndrina Franco is a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Reggio Calabria, Italy, primarily active in Pellaro and Lazzaro. It is involved in drug and arms trafficking, contract control, and extortion rackets. The group is allied with the Barreca clan. Founded by Giovanni Franco, it has been active since at least the 1990s and remains operational.
